name: CrossSeasonReputation
description: Bridging attestation issued at season end. Encodes a compressed summary of the prior season's trust profile, preserving reputation across seasonal resets.

fields.name: merkleRoot
fields.description: Merkle root of the underlying season attestation set

dimensions.description: Each encoded score maps directly to its dimension at 50% weight. New-season attestations layer on top.

notes: Allows multi-season agents to carry history without replaying all attestations. merkleRoot enables on-chain verification of the underlying season data. Issued by platform at season boundary.
